basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Homeopathy Physician Notification 2026 has been released on 27 June 2026 on the official website esic.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ESIC Homeopathy Physician Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC and all others as per Central Government Rule. No age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC applying for unreserved vacancies.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Homeopathy of a recognized University or statutory State Board or Council or equivalent recognized under the Homeopathy Central Council Act, 1973 (59 of 1973), Enrolment on the Central Register of Homeopathy or State Register of Homeopathy
qualification.details: Degree in Homeopathy of a recognized University or statutory State Board or Council or equivalent recognized under the Homeopathy Central Council Act, 1973 (59 of 1973). Enrolment on the Central Register of Homeopathy or State Register of Homeopathy.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ESIC Homeopathy Physician Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ESIC Homeopathy Physician Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Homeopathy Physician recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Homeopathy Physician post at ESIC is scheduled for 06th July 2026. Candidates are advised to confirm their attendance by email by 04th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Homeopathy Physician post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Homeopathy from a recognized University or statutory State Board or Council, or an equivalent qualification recognized under the Homeopathy Central Council Act, 1973. Additionally, enrolment on the Central Register of Homeopathy or State Register of Homeopathy is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Homeopathy Physician position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Homeopathy Physician post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Central Government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Homeopathy Physician role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Homeopathy Physician post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Homeopathy Physician post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Homeopathy Physician post in the Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being done through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to report to the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including educational certificates, proof of identity, and any other relevant certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Homeopathy Physician recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Homeopathy Physician post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification followed by a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781022. The specific venue details will be available in the official notification.
